name: LangSmith
description: LangChain's platform for tracing, evaluating, and monitoring LLM applications. Captures full chain traces, enables dataset-driven evaluation, and surfaces latency and cost metrics.
curator_note: Essential observability layer for any LangChain or LangGraph production deployment.

name: Weights & Biases
description: MLOps platform for tracking experiments, versioning datasets and models, and visualizing training runs. Integrates with PyTorch, HuggingFace, and most major training frameworks.
curator_note: Industry-standard experiment tracker; indispensable for any serious fine-tuning project.

name: Cursor
description: AI-first code editor built on VS Code with deeply integrated LLM assistance. Supports multi-file edits, codebase-aware chat, and inline completions from frontier models.
curator_note: Highest-leverage AI coding tool available; multi-file edits close the loop on agentic coding.

name: Ollama
description: Run large language models locally on macOS, Linux, and Windows with a single CLI command. Ships with a REST API compatible with OpenAI's API surface for easy swapping.
curator_note: The easiest way to run open models locally — one command and it just works.

name: vLLM
description: High-throughput and memory-efficient LLM inference server using PagedAttention. Supports continuous batching, tensor parallelism, and an OpenAI-compatible API for production serving.
curator_note: PagedAttention makes it 2-24x faster than naive serving — the default choice for GPU inference.
